title: sphaeralcea subhastata subsp. pumila
intro: Sphaeralcea subhastata subsp. pumila, also known as dwarf globemallow, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mallow family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea subhastata subsp. pumila include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often combining it with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
